name: _ITEMDATABASE_GET_ITEM_TAG_TAGS
comment:
Returns the ci tags of the selected item tag
key: Hash — Wanted key (e.g WEAPON_RIFLE_VARMINT).tag: Hash — The item tag (e.g TAG_ITEM_PROPERTY).data: Any* - CI tag list starting at the offset "1", the offset 0 is to define the max number of tags you want to collect (uselly 5 in R* scripts, surelly the limit)
research: Recupere la liste des tags associes a une cle d'objet et renvoie le nombre de tags ecrits dans le buffer de donnees. *(OCR - a verifier)*
lua:
-- 0x8870895BA5ED9385 · build 1232
local key = 0
local tagType = 0
local result, outData = ItemdatabaseGetItemTagTags(key, tagType)

name: _ITEMDATABASE_GET_SHOP_LAYOUT_PAGE_INFO_BY_INDEX
comment: Returns the layout page info at the selected index
research: Recupere des donnees (par exemple une cle de page) en remplissant un buffer de sortie ; renvoie un booleen de succes. *(OCR - a verifier)*
lua:
-- 0xDBEADA0DF5F9AB9F · build 1355
local layout = 0
local index = 0
local result, outPageKey = ItemdatabaseGetShopLayoutPageInfoByIndex(layout, index)

examples.code:
local data = DataView.ArrayBuffer(4 * 8)
if (Citizen.InvokeNative(0xDBEADA0DF5F9AB9F, `st_doctor`, 0, data:Buffer()) == 1) then
local pageKey = data:GetInt32(0)
end
